name: CBG Gummies Mixed Berry
shortDescription: Mixed berry, non-intoxicating CBG-rich gummies with label-backed serving details for adult wellness routines.
fullDescription: Small-batch mixed berry gummies made for adult CBG-rich hemp wellness routines. The supplied Funni Farm label states 2-3 mg CBG per gummy, 100-150 mg total CBG per 50-gummy bag, and adult-use directions. Batch details and current lab records are reviewed before order approval.
ingredients: Water, corn syrup, MCT oil (hemp-derived CBG extract), gelatin, natural and artificial flavors, citric acid, guar gum, malic acid, potassium sorbate (preservative), sodium benzoate (preservative). Contains coconut from MCT oil. This product may contain allergens.
cannabinoidInfo: The supplied label states 2-3 mg CBG per gummy and 100-150 mg total CBG per 50-gummy bag. Current batch lab records are reviewed before order approval.
hempComplianceNote: Label includes hemp-derived adult-use compliance language, 21+ only positioning, family-owned/farm-to-plate badges, blank lot/batch/MFG/best-by fields, and a scan area for COA, cannabinoid profile, and third-party lab results. Current batch records are reviewed before order approval.
shippingRestrictions: Ships only where hemp-derived edible products are permitted. Destination eligibility is reviewed before payment instructions are sent.

name: Jack Frost CBG Hemp Flower
shortDescription: Farm-grown, non-intoxicating Jack Frost hemp flower with a real COA-linked CBG/CBGA profile.
fullDescription: A CBG-rich Jack Frost hemp listing connected to a New Bloom Labs plant/biomass COA for transparency and education. The uploaded COA shows hemp-compliance-focused cannabinoid results and a standout CBGA signal for the tested sample. Finished flower packaging, inventory, and shipping eligibility are reviewed before any order is approved.
cannabinoidInfo: New Bloom Labs COA for Jack Frost cbg_001 reports Total THC 0.113%, Delta-9 THC 0.019%, CBGA 9.268%, CBG 0.201%, CBC 0.039%, and CBCA 0.302% for a plant/biomass sample tested 11/10/2022.
hempComplianceNote: COA shown for transparency only. The Jack Frost cbg_001 plant/biomass sample reports Total THC 0.113% and Delta-9 THC 0.019%. Results apply only to the tested sample and date listed on the report.
shippingRestrictions: Hemp flower and biomass may have additional state restrictions. Destination eligibility is reviewed before payment instructions are sent.
